zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip de Bodrugan於大約1225年出生在英國可瓦爾時，他的父親Henry de Bodrugan Sheriff of Cornwal36歲，母親Juliana Cardinan27歲。他於大約1240年與Roselyn de Hendresuk - Heiress of Endellion在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1283年之後在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philip de Bodrugan于大约1225年出生在英国可瓦爾时，他的父亲Henry de Bodrugan Sheriff of Cornwal36岁，母亲Juliana Cardinan27岁。他于大约1240年与Roselyn de Hendresuk - Heiress of Endellion在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1283年之后在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Philip de Bodrugan was born about 1225, in Cornwall, England, his father, Henry de Bodrugan Sheriff of Cornwal, was 36 and his mother, Juliana Cardinan, was 27. He married Roselyn de Hendresuk - Heiress of Endellion about 1240, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died after 1283, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philip de Bodrugan est né environ 1225, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Bodrugan Sheriff of Cornwal, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Juliana Cardinan, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Roselyn de Hendresuk - Heiress of Endellion environ 1240, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1283, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philip de Bodrugan um 1225 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Bodrugan Sheriff of Cornwal 36 und seine Mutter Juliana Cardinan 27. Er hat um 1240 in England Roselyn de Hendresuk - Heiress of Endellion geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1283 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philip de Bodrugan è nato il circa 1225 nel Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Henry de Bodrugan Sheriff of Cornwal, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Juliana Cardinan, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Roselyn de Hendresuk - Heiress of Endellion circa 1240, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1283, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Philip de Bodruganが約1225年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Henry de Bodrugan Sheriff of Cornwalは36歳，母Juliana Cardinanは27歳であった。約1240年にイギリスでRoselyn de Hendresuk - Heiress of Endellionと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1283年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philip de Bodrugan(이)가 대략 1225년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Bodrugan Sheriff of Cornwal(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana Cardinan(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1240년 영국에서 Roselyn de Hendresuk - Heiress of Endellion(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1283년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philip de Bodrugan nasceu aproximadamente 1225, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Bodrugan Sheriff of Cornwal, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Juliana Cardinan, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Roselyn de Hendresuk - Heiress of Endellion aproximadamente 1240, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 1283, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philip de Bodrugan родился около 1225 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Bodrugan Sheriff of Cornwal было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Juliana Cardinan, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Roselyn de Hendresuk - Heiress of Endellion около 1240 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер после 1283 г. в его родном городе.

sm.about 1225–after 1283: e tusa o le 1225–ina ua ma'ea le 1283

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philip de Bodrugan nació aproximadamente 1225, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Bodrugan Sheriff of Cornwal, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Juliana Cardinan, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Roselyn de Hendresuk - Heiress of Endellion aproximadamente 1240, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1283, en su pueblo.
